query:

('SGDJPY', 'Singapore Dollar / Japanese Yen', 'forex', 'SGD', 'JPY', 3, 100000, 0.01, 100, 0.01, 3.0, 1),
('ZARJPY', 'South African Rand / Japanese Yen', 'forex', 'ZAR', 'JPY', 3, 100000, 0.01, 100, 0.01, 5.0, 1),
('TRYJPY', 'Turkish Lira / Japanese Yen', 'forex', 'TRY', 'JPY', 3, 100000, 0.01, 100, 0.01, 8.0, 1),

('SEKJPY', 'Swedish Krona / Japanese Yen', 'forex', 'SEK', 'JPY', 3, 100000, 0.01, 100, 0.01, 4.0, 1),
('XRPBTC', 'Ripple / Bitcoin', 'crypto', 'XRP', 'BTC', 8, 1, 0.01, 100, 0.01, 0.00001, 1),

('ZINC', 'Zinc', 'commodities', NULL, NULL, 0, 25, 0.01, 100, 0.01, 10, 1);
